description: This book has an attractive design with a difference. Our password keeper journal provides you with a handy discrete place to store all your personal information and passwords for various websites which you have signed up with. With this book, you can store it amongst you other books away from prying eyes and thieves. There is a short section, with an example of how to write your information in the book to ensure that it is extra safe. Our 5x8in version also includes 60 pages listed alphabetically for you to document details of websites which you have passwords for. Each page has 4 formatted boxes for you to store your information, with a notes section at the end to keep the extra details you may need. Our password keeper also comes in various alternative cover designs to meet your needs. Read more
